message.content:
Review the InvoiceCashbackPoints migration for potential runtime issues.

ZUSTAND STATE MAPPING:
- points comes from pointsBalance.points in extract store
- pointsQuantity comes from parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity in parameter store
- isLoadingParameterization is derived from parameterPointsProgram.status
- requestParameterization calls getParameterPointsProgram() service

REDUX STATE MAPPING (before):
- pointsReducer.points - number
- pointsReducer.pointsQuantity - number  
- pointsReducer?.isLoadingParameterization - boolean
- requestParameterization - Redux action

Questions:
1. Are the data types compatible? (number → number, boolean → boolean)
2. Is the requestParameterization function signature compatible?
3. Will the component behave the same at runtime?
4. Are there any null/undefined edge cases to consider?

Look for potential runtime issues. PASS/FAIL verdict.

content.text: I'll review the InvoiceCashbackPoints migration for runtime issues. Let me start by examining the relevant files.

content.text: Now let me examine the InvoiceCashbackPoints files and the Redux/Zustand state structures.

content.content:
1→import {
     2→  Box,
     3→  Text,
     4→  ListTextIcon,
     5→  Button,
     6→  InputBox,
     7→  Icon,
     8→  BackDropBottom,
     9→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    10→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    11→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    12→import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
    13→import {
    14→  formatCurrencyBR,
    15→  getFormattedPoints,
    16→  getParsedCurrency,
    17→  getParsePoints,
    18→} from '../../utils/functions';
    19→import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';
    20→
    21→const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
    22→  handleGoBack,
    23→  handleContinue,
    24→  points,
    25→  formattedPrice,
    26→  handleChangeReais,
    27→  handleChangePoints,
    28→  handleUseAll,
    29→  pointsValue,
    30→  reaisValue,
    31→  convertionValue,
    32→  pointsError,
    33→  reaisError,
    34→  items,
    35→  pointsQuantity,
    36→  handleModalizeContinue,
    37→  onOpenDefault,
    38→  modalizeRef1,
    39→  handleSelectEvent,
    40→  height,
    41→  width,
    42→  isLoadingParameterization,
    43→}) => {
    44→  return (
    45→    <BasicScreen
    46→      hasScroll
    47→      hasHeader
    48→      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
    49→      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    50→      title="Cashback na fatura"
    51→      hasRightIcon
    52→      rightIcon="icon-help"
    53→      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
    54→      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    55→      isLoading={false}
    56→    >
    57→      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
    58→        <Text
    59→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
    60→          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
    61→          type="headingMDL"
    62→          mt="smaller"
    63→        >
    64→          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
    65→        </Text>
    66→
    67→        <Box direction="row" mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
    68→          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
    69→            Pontos disponíveis:
    70→          </Text>
    71→          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
    72→            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
    73→          </Text>
    74→          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
    75→        </Box>
    76→
    77→        <InputBox
    78→          label="Valor em pontos"
    79→          placeholder="0"
    80→          showLabel
    81→          keyboardType="number-pad"
    82→          value={pointsValue}
    83→          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
    84→          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
    85→          error={pointsError}
    86→          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
    87→          textRight="Usar todos"
    88→          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
    89→        />
    90→
    91→        <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
    92→          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
    93→          <Icon
    94→            name="icon-switch-vertical"
    95→            size="xxs"
    96→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
    97→            mr="nano"
    98→            ml="nano"
    99→          />
   100→          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
   101→        </Box>
   102→
   103→        <InputBox
   104→          label="Valor em reais"
   105→          placeholder="R$0,00"
   106→          showLabel
   107→          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
   108→          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
   109→          value={reaisValue}
   110→          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
   111→          error={reaisError}
   112→          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
   113→        />
   114→        {isLoadingParameterization && (
   115→          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">

file.content:
import {
  Box,
  Text,
  ListTextIcon,
  Button,
  InputBox,
  Icon,
  BackDropBottom,
} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
import React, { FC } from 'react';
import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
import {
  formatCurrencyBR,
  getFormattedPoints,
  getParsedCurrency,
  getParsePoints,
} from '../../utils/functions';
import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';

const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
  handleGoBack,
  handleContinue,
  points,
  formattedPrice,
  handleChangeReais,
  handleChangePoints,
  handleUseAll,
  pointsValue,
  reaisValue,
  convertionValue,
  pointsError,
  reaisError,
  items,
  pointsQuantity,
  handleModalizeContinue,
  onOpenDefault,
  modalizeRef1,
  handleSelectEvent,
  height,
  width,
  isLoadingParameterization,
}) => {
  return (
    <BasicScreen
      hasScroll
      hasHeader
      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
      title="Cashback na fatura"
      hasRightIcon
      rightIcon="icon-help"
      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
      isLoading={false}
    >
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
        <Text
          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
          type="headingMDL"
          mt="smaller"
        >
          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
        </Text>

        <Box direction="row" mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
            Pontos disponíveis:
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
          </Text>
          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em pontos"
          placeholder="0"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="number-pad"
          value={pointsValue}
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
          error={pointsError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
          textRight="Usar todos"
          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
        />

        <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
          <Icon
            name="icon-switch-vertical"
            size="xxs"
            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
            mr="nano"
            ml="nano"
          />
          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
        </Box>

        <InputBox
          label="Valor em reais"
          placeholder="R$0,00"
          showLabel
          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
          value={reaisValue}
          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
          error={reaisError}
          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
        />
        {isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
          </Box>
        )}
        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
          <Box direction="row" mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
            <Text type="paragraphMD">
              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de
              cashback na fatura.
            </Text>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>
      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
        <Button
          disabled={
            pointsValue === '' ||
            reaisValue === '' ||
            pointsValue === '0' ||
            reaisValue === '0' ||
            pointsError ||
            reaisError
          }
          text="Continuar"
          mt="large"
          mb="small"
          onPress={() => {
            const ptsSel = getParsePoints(pointsValue);
            const reaisSel = getParsedCurrency(reaisValue);
            handleContinue({ pointsSelected: ptsSel, reaisSelected: reaisSel });
          }}
          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
        />
      </Box>
      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
        </Text>

        <ListTextIcon items={items} ml="nano" mr="nano" type="list" mb="smaller" />

        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
      </BackDropBottom>
    </BasicScreen>
  );
};

export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;
